final:
module mux4x1 (  
    input wire [3:0] in,  // 4 input signals  
    input wire [1:0] sel, // 2-bit select signal  
    output wire out       // output signal  
);  
    wire mux_output = (sel == 2'b00) ? in[0] :  
                 (sel == 2'b01) ? in[1] :  
                 (sel == 2'b10) ? in[2] :  
                 in[3];
    assign out = mux_output; // default to in[3]  
endmodule
